diagrams.label: H1 diagram
diagrams.description: Shaded shape formed by four equal circular arcs around a central square.

diagrams.label: H2 network
diagrams.description: Network of connected triangles with endpoints labelled A and B.

diagrams.label: H3 squares
diagrams.description: Two squares and a diagonal segment forming trapezium BCGF; vertices labelled A, B, C, D, E, F, G.

notes: Only the three right-hand-side diagrams for problems H1–H3 were included; text-only regions were excluded.
